site.title: International Accessibility Task Force (Myen Mung Hta Chye Chyang Lu Ai Lam Hte Seng Ai Magam Dap)
site.tagline: Public repo de shang lu na matu ra kadawn ai lam
nav.label: Shawng lam
nav.languageNoMatch: Matut mahkai ai lam n nga
skip.toContent: Matut mahkai na matu sa u
hero.home.eyebrow: Open Source lu la mai ai lam
hero.join.eyebrow: Hkaw tsun bungli hta shang lawm u
meta.home.description: IATF gaw teng sha nga ai accessibility ra kadawn ai lam ni hpe open source repository ni byin hkra galaw ya ai.
meta.projects.description: IATF hku nna shapraw da ai masha yawng lu mai ai project ni hpe tam yu u.
meta.propose.description: IATF kaw nna web, email, or Discord hku nna accessibility project hpe hpyi shawn u.
meta.governance.description: IATF gaw masing ni hpe gara hku hkap la ai, mahkawng da ai lam ni hte bungli ni hpe masha yawng chye hkra gara hku galaw ai lam hpe hti yu u.
meta.join.description: IATF hta shang lawm lu ai lam ni: code bang ai, ga gale ai, chyam dinglik ai (sh) project langai hpe matut manoi galaw ai.
meta.accessibility.description: IATF gaw ndai website hpe gara hku lu mai hkra galaw mayu ai kun?
meta.transparency.description: Public records of IATF: dawdan ai lam ni, project ni hte update ni hpe default hku nna hpaw da ya ai.
actions.proposeProject: Bungli langai hpe galaw hpang u
actions.emailProjects: Email project ni hte seng ai laika ngau
actions.joinDiscord: Myit n hkrum ai lam hta shang lawm u
registry.empty.title: Laika buk garai n shapraw shi ai
registry.empty.body: IATF gaw shi a shawng nnan na masha yawng a matu masing jahkrat da ai laika buk hpe hkyen lajang nga ai.
proposal.form.title: hpyi shawn laika bang u
proposal.form.body: IATF de hpyi shawn laika bang na matu lawu na form hpe jahpring u.
proposal.form.noscript: Ndai web form hpe lang na matu JavaScript ra ai. Dai n nga yang, email or Discord hpe lang u.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Ndai grupyin hta Live Submission hpe n bang da ai. Ndai form gaw na a email client hpe hpaw ya na ra ai.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Matut mahkai na matu hkyen lajang nga...
proposal.form.ready: Secure submission gaw hkyen sai. Nang request hpe shangun dat ai shaloi, IATF gaw intake record hpe galaw ya na ra ai.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: N kau mi hpe n shagun shi yang, spam makawp maga ai hpe ngut kre hkra galaw u.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Spam hpe makawp maga ai lam htum sai.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Spam protection hpe ya aten hta n lu jep ai. kalang bai chyam yu u.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Spam hpe makawp maga ai aten htum sai.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: N-galaw shi yang, ra ai shara ni hpe jahpring ya u.
proposal.form.submitting: Sawk sagawn ai lam galaw na matu hpyi shawn u.
proposal.form.successTitle: Lu la ai hpyi shawn laika
proposal.form.success: Chyeju. Na a hpyi shawn ai lam hpe lu la nna bai maram yu na matu mahkawng da ai.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ndai ra ai lam hte seng nna IATF hpe bai matut mahkai mayu yang lawu na lam matsun ni hpe tsun dan u.
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Open intake record (Jaw la ai jahpan hpaw da ai)
proposal.form.successSummaryTitle: Hpa hpe sa ya ai kun?
proposal.form.reset: Hpang kalang bai hpyi shawn u
proposal.form.errorGeneric: hpyi shawn ai shaloi shut ai lam nga ai. kalang bai chyam yu u. Manghkang naw nga yang, email hpe lang u.
proposal.subjectUntitled: Mying n lawm ai hpyi shawn laika
project.detail.eyebrow: Mung shawa ni shang lawm ai masing
project.detail.recordKicker: Hkaw Tsun Bungli Hpe Akyu Jashawn U
project.detail.problemTitle: Ndai masing gaw gara manghkang hpe hparan ya ai kun?
project.detail.whyTitle: Ndai masing a yaw shada lam
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: Matut mahkai na lam nnga ai
project.detail.field.requestedBy: Dai hpe hpyi shawn ai wa gaw
project.detail.field.languageNotes: Amyu ga hte seng ai matsun ni
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Ga gale da ai Chyum daw ni hpe hpang de bai kahtap bang mai ai
footer.label: Site lagaw laika
footer.howToContribute: Gara hku shang lawm mai ai kun?
footer.licenseContent: Matut mahkai ai lam CC BY-SA 4.0
footer.licenseCode: Code AGPL-3.0 hpe mu lu ai.
footer.blurb: Accessibility hte seng ai bungli ni hpe galaw hpang na matu, shapraw na matu hte matut nna hpaw da na matu grau loi ra ai.
footer.source: Accessibility standard ni hte seng nna matsun da ai lam ni: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Hkamja lam hte seng nna karum shingtau ai ladat ni hpe akyu jashawn ai ni kaw nna sharin la lu ai.
contact.label: Hkawm Chyai Lamang
translation.label: Ga gale ai lam
translation.source: Ndai laika man a npawt nhpang ga gaw Inglik ga re.
translation.humanReviewed: Ndai ga gale ai hpe ga shaga chye ai masha langai gaw bai maram da ai.
translation.machineAssisted: Ndai ga gale laika gaw, machine-assisted re majaw, ga shaga chye ai masha langai ngai e, tsep kawp n dinglik yu shi ai. Mungga ni hpe, GitHub hku nna, hkap la mai nga ai.
translation.needsUpdate: Ndai ga gale laika hpe, hpang jahtum na English source update garai n galaw shi yang, bai gram lajang da ai rai nna, gram lajang ra na re.
translation.report: Ga gale ai lam hte seng ai manghkang hpe shana u: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Hpa majaw kun?
